---
title: "YGR067C_EVE_growth"
author: "Erik Bjurström"
date: "2024-09-13"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r libraries}
#Loads all the libraries needed for analysis
library(tidyverse,warn.conflicts = F)
library(ggplot2,warn.conflicts = F)
library(zoo)
library(svglite)
```


```{r}
# Imports all the R functions in this Rmd from subdir "R_scripts"
file.sources = list.files("../R_scripts",pattern = "*.R",full.names = T)
sapply(file.sources, source, .GlobalEnv)
```

```{r Growth curves}
growth_data <- read.csv("./data/all_measurements.csv", sep = ",", quote="")
str_sub(growth_data$sample_phase, 1, 1) <- str_sub(growth_data$sample_phase, 1, 1) %>% str_to_upper()
colnames(growth_data) = c("dt", "test_name", "loop", "plate", "well", "OD560", "hours", "row", "column", "quadrant", "Strain", "Phase")
```

```{r}
loopbreaks <- c()
for (i in seq(1,6)) {
  loopbreaks <- c(loopbreaks, growth_data %>% subset(plate == i & well == "A01" & hours < 20) %>% dplyr::select(loop) %>% max())
}

endofexp <- c()
for (i in seq(1,6)) {
  endofexp <- c(endofexp, growth_data %>% subset(plate == i & well == "A01" & hours > 20) %>% dplyr::select(loop) %>% max())
}

all_of_curve <- growth_data %>% subset(Phase == "Post-shift") %>% mutate(plate = as.numeric(plate)) %>% subset(!(loop %in% c(1,2) & hours > 1.4)) %>% subset(!(hours < 1.5))  %>% mutate(loop = if_else(hours > 11.8, loop + loopbreaks[plate], loop))



all_of_curve <- all_of_curve %>% subset(!(loop > min(loopbreaks) + min(endofexp))) %>% subset(plate %in% seq(6)) %>% mutate(Replicate = paste0(plate, "_", well))

perplate <- all_of_curve %>% group_by(loop, Strain) %>% summarise(medOD = median(OD560))

smc <- perplate %>% ungroup() %>% group_by(Strain) %>% arrange(Strain) %>% mutate(mm5 = rollapply(medOD, 6, median, fill = NA, align = "center"), mad5 = rollapply(medOD,6, mad, fill = NA, align = "center")) %>% mutate(adjhours = loop/3)

sp <- ggplot() + geom_line(data = all_of_curve, aes(x = hours, y = OD560, group = Replicate, color = Strain), alpha = 0.035) + 
  geom_line(data = smc, aes(x = adjhours, y = mm5, color = Strain), size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#FF61CC", "#00BE67")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 11.5, linetype = "dotted", colour = "black") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 23.8, linetype = "dotted", colour = "black") +
  ylab("Rolling median of OD560 (k=5)") + xlab("Adjusted time (hours)") +
  xlim(1.5,24) + ylim(0,0.45) + theme_classic() 
sp
```

```{r Amiga processing}

ppath <- "./data/Amiga"

full_curve <- growth_data %>% mutate(hours = hours * 3600) %>% rename(seconds = hours) %>% mutate(plate = as.numeric(plate)) %>% subset(!(loop %in% c(1,2) & seconds > 5000)) %>% subset(!(seconds < 5400))

map_df <- full_curve %>% subset(loop == 7 & seconds < 30000) %>% dplyr::select(well, plate, Strain, Phase) %>% mutate(Replicate = floor(0.5+plate/2)) %>% mutate(plate = paste0("plate_", plate)) %>% mutate(Comments = paste0(Strain, "_", Phase))  %>% mutate(Group = 1 + (Strain == "YGR067C") + 2*(Phase == "Post-shift")) %>% mutate(Control = rep(0, length(Group))) %>% mutate(Strain = if_else(Strain == "WT", "BY4741", "YGR067C_ko")) %>% rename(Isolate = Strain) %>% rename(Plate_ID = plate) %>% rename(Well = well) %>% dplyr::select(-Phase) %>% relocate(Replicate, .after = Group)

plates <- list()
platemaps <- list()

for (i in 1:6) {
  data_name <- paste0("plate_", i)
  tmp <- reshape2::dcast(subset(full_curve, full_curve$plate == i), well ~ seconds, value.var ="OD560") %>% as.data.frame()
  colnames(tmp)[1] <- "Time"
  plates <- c(plates, list(tmp))
  names(plates)[i] <- data_name
  
  platemaps <- c(platemaps, list(map_df %>% subset(Plate_ID == data_name)))
  names(platemaps)[i] <- data_name
}

mapply(write.table, x = plates, file =paste0(ppath, "/data/", names(plates), ".txt"), quote = F, row.names = F, sep = "\t")

mapply(write.table, x = platemaps, file =paste0(ppath, "/mapping/", names(plates), ".txt"), quote = F, row.names = F, sep = "\t")

```

```{r}
all_data <- read_all_data("./data/Amiga/summary")
```

```{r}
gglist <- lapply(all_data, get_param, c(3,4), "gr")
glist <- gglist
for (i in seq_along(glist)) {
  colnames(glist[[i]]) = c("Plate_ID", "Isolate", "gr", "Well")
}
glist <- bind_rows(glist)
```

```{r}
glistdata <- data.frame(BY4741 = glist[glist$Isolate =="BY4741",]$gr, YGR067C_ko = glist[glist$Isolate == "YGR067C_ko",]$gr)
```

```{r}
ODMlist <- lapply(all_data, get_param, c(3,4), "OD_Max")
ODlist <- ODMlist
for (i in seq_along(ODlist)) {
  colnames(ODlist[[i]]) = c("Plate_ID", "Isolate", "OD_Max", "Well")
}
ODlist <- bind_rows(ODlist)
```

```{r}
set.seed(2021)

original_g <- diff(tapply(glist$gr, glist$Isolate, mean))
original_ODM <- diff(tapply(ODlist$OD_Max,ODlist$Isolate, mean))

growth_perm_test <- permutation.test(glist$Isolate, glist$gr, original_g, 10000)

MaxOD_perm_test <- permutation.test(ODlist$Isolate, ODlist$OD_Max, original_ODM, 10000)
```

```{r}
growth_perm_test_g <- growth_perm_test[[2]] %>% as.data.frame()
colnames(growth_perm_test_g) <- c("Perms")
n <- growth_perm_test[[2]] %>% length()

annotation <- data.frame(
   x = c(original_g-0.0025),
   y = c(1000),
   label = c(paste0("∆µ = ", round(original_g,3)))
)


growth_perm_plot<- ggplot(growth_perm_test_g, aes(x =Perms)) + geom_histogram(fill = "grey70", color = "black") + geom_vline(xintercept = original_g, color = "#C77CFF", size = 1.2, linetype= 5) +  xlab("∆µ (Reference strain - YGR067C∆)") + ylab("Count") + scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(add = c(0,100), mult = c(0,0))) + geom_text(data = annotation, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label), color = "#C77CFF", size = 5, angle = 90, fontface = "bold") + theme_classic()

growth_perm_plot
```

```{r}
MaxOD_perm_test_g <- MaxOD_perm_test[[2]] %>% as.data.frame()
colnames(MaxOD_perm_test_g) <- c("Perms")
n <- MaxOD_perm_test[[2]] %>% length()

annotation <- data.frame(
   x = c(original_ODM-0.0025),
   y = c(1000),
   label = c(paste0("∆OD_Max = ", round(original_ODM,3)))
)


MaxOD_perm_test_plot <- ggplot(MaxOD_perm_test_g, aes(x =Perms)) + geom_histogram(fill = "grey70", color = "black") + geom_vline(xintercept = original_ODM, color = "#C77CFF", size = 1.2, linetype= 5) +  xlab("∆OD_Max (Reference strain - YGR067C∆)") + ylab("Count") + scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(add = c(0,100), mult = c(0,0))) + geom_text(data = annotation, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label), color = "#C77CFF", size = 5, angle = 90, fontface = "bold") + theme_classic()

MaxOD_perm_test_plot
```

```{r}
wb <- createWorkbook()
addWorksheet(wb, "Growth_data")
writeData(wb, "Growth_data", growth_data, keepNA = T)
saveWorkbook(wb, "../out/Tables/S_table_1.xlsx")
```

```{r}
ggsave(sp,
       filename="../out/Figures/Fig_2A.pdf",
       device = "pdf",
       height = 5, width = 12, units = "in")
```
